title: Karam Chand Thapar & Bros Coal Sales ransomware incident

victim.name: Karam Chand Thapar & Bros Coal Sales

extortion.description: Karam Chand Thapar & Bros Coal Sales - it is the flagship company of the KCT Group of companies. It was founded by the late Karam Chand Axe in 1943. Today, the company provides coal services and logistics.The company's office is located 25 Brabourne Rd, Kolkata, West Bengal, 700084, India
